raw.message: Miss the party? Return now and enjoy massive wins again!

hook.summary: A purple wolf blows away a grid of houses to reveal a hidden mansion.
hook.visual_action: The wolf character takes a deep breath and blows, clearing the screen of small house icons.

scene_flow: A purple wolf peers over a dense grid of small brick house icons.
The wolf inhales and blows a powerful gust of wind, scattering the houses.
A grand mansion and lush garden are revealed behind the cleared icons.
The game title 'Huff N' Even More Puff Grand' and 'Jackpot Party' logo appear.
A 'PLAY NOW!' button is displayed as gold coins rain down across the screen.
on_screen_text: HUFF N' EVEN MORE PUFF GRAND
audience_proxy: Adult social casino players who enjoy classic slot themes and satisfying visual progression.
